TASK-008.finding: MEDIUM-001 task-level Human-Gate record id normalization

medium.title: Task-level Human-Gate execution record coverage is incomplete/inconsistent
evidence: quant-proj reports/human_gate/decisions.jsonl contains batch authorization HG-NIGHT-BATCH-20260704-L1-L4.
US_Stock_Monitor reports/human_gate/decisions.jsonl contains distinct HG-EXEC records for TASK-006 and TASK-010.
market_data reports/human_gate/decisions.jsonl contains a task-scoped TASK-008 record but reuses the batch decision id instead of a unique HG-EXEC-TASK-008 id.

A_Share_Monitor has TASK-007 and TASK-009 transcripts, manifests/gate reports, hashes, and Codex acceptance reports citing HG-NIGHT-BATCH-20260704-L1-L4, but no reports/human_gate/decisions.jsonl or HG-EXEC-TASK-007 / HG-EXEC-TASK-009 durable execution record was found.
medium.impact: Recorded execution behavior appears bounded and safe, but task-level Human-Gate traceability is not uniformly reconstructable from durable decision logs.
medium.required_fix: Before final ChatGPT external-audit packet publication, add post-execution traceability records or exception records for TASK-007 and TASK-009 linked to HG-NIGHT-BATCH-20260704-L1-L4, normalize TASK-008 with a unique task-level HG-EXEC-TASK-008 record or alias, include exact commands, permission levels, allowed/forbidden scope, stop conditions, transcript paths/hashes, manifest or gate-report paths, validation, and non-authorization boundaries, and label after-the-fact records as traceability evidence rather than retroactive pre-execution approval.
medium.future_control: Require a unique HG-EXEC-TASK-* record before each L1-L4 execution.

low.title: Repo handoff file still has N/A for the base audit point
evidence: reports/agent_handoff/night_batch_recorded_execution_codex_audit_handoff_20260704.md has tag, commit, and tree set to N/A.
The delegated audit prompt supplied the final immutable tuple and local Git verification passed, but the repo handoff file is not self-contained.
low.impact: A future external reviewer using only the repo handoff file would not see the final immutable audit tuple in that primary handoff.
low.required_fix: Before final ChatGPT external-audit packet publication, create or update the final publication handoff with repository, tag, tag object, commit, tree, paths to this audit report and findings JSON, and the not-self-declared-final-verdict boundary.
